events.text: Goal! France 1, Senegal 0. Kylian Mbappé (France) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Michael Olise with a through ball.
Substitution, Senegal. Ibrahim Mbaye replaces Ismaïla Sarr.
Substitution, Senegal. Habib Diarra replaces Lamine Camara.
Substitution, France. Bradley Barcola replaces Ousmane Dembélé.
Goal! France 2, Senegal 0. Bradley Barcola (France) right footed shot from the right side of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Adrien Rabiot with a through ball following a fast break.
Substitution, Senegal. Iliman Ndiaye replaces Pape Gueye.
Substitution, Senegal. Bamba Dieng replaces Nicolas Jackson.
Substitution, France. Rayan Cherki replaces Désiré Doué.
Substitution, Senegal. Pathé Ciss replaces Idrissa Gueye.
Goal! France 2, Senegal 1. Ibrahim Mbaye (Senegal) right footed shot from the right side of the box to the top right corner. Assisted by Iliman Ndiaye following a fast break.
Goal! France 3, Senegal 1. Kylian Mbappé (France) right footed shot from outside the box to the top left corner.
